info.name: Pathdigonto Book Hub API
info.description: Complete collection for Pathdigonto Backend. Base URL variable: {{baseUrl}} (default: http://localhost:5000). JWT is auto-saved to {{jwt_token}} on Login / Verify Registration.

request.description:
Creates an unverified user account and sends a 6-digit OTP to the provided email.

**Response:** `{ success, message }`

Verifies the OTP, activates the account, and issues a JWT token.

**Response:** `{ success, token, user: { id, name, email, role } }`

Authenticates via email + password and returns a JWT.

**Response:** `{ success, token, user: { id, name, email, role } }`

Verifies a Google ID token and creates/logs in the user.

**Response:** `{ success, token, user: { id, name, email, role } }`

Invalidates the session / clears cookies.

**Response:** `{ success, message }`

Fetches the authenticated user's full profile.

**Response:** `{ success, user: { id, name, email, phone, loyaltyPoints, role } }`

Updates name and/or phone for the authenticated user.

**Response:** `{ success, user: { id, name, phone } }`

Creates a new shipping address for the user.

**Response:** `{ success, address: { id, street, city, isDefault } }`

Lists all saved addresses for the authenticated user.

**Response:** `{ success, addresses: [...] }`

Updates an existing address by its ID.

**Response:** `{ success, address: { ... } }`

Deletes a shipping address by its ID.

**Response:** `{ success, message }`

Returns paginated books with optional filters.

**Response:** `{ success, books: [...], meta: { total, page, limit, totalPages } }`

Returns the 10 most recently added active books, sorted by `createdAt DESC`.

**Response:** `{ success, books: [{ id, title, price, imageUrls, author, publisher, category, createdAt }] }`

Returns the top 10 books by total units sold across all orders.

**Response:** `{ success, books: [{ id, title, price, imageUrls, totalSold, author, publisher, category }] }`

Case-insensitive title search, returns up to 10 matches.

**Response:** `{ success, books: [{ id, title, price, imageUrls, author }] }`

Returns full book detail including category, author, publisher, combo links, and top 10 approved reviews.

**Response:** `{ success, book: { ...allFields, category, author, publisher, reviews, comboItems } }`

Returns all categories sorted alphabetically.

**Response:** `{ success, categories: [{ id, name, slug }] }`

Returns all active books filtered by category slug (e.g. `fiction`, `science`, `history`).

**Response:** `{ success, category: { id, name, slug }, books: [...] }`

Returns all active combo offers with nested book details.

**Response:** `{ success, combos: [{ id, title, price, imageUrls, comboItems: [{ book }] }] }`

Returns all authors sorted alphabetically by name.

**Response:** `{ success, authors: [{ id, name, bio }] }`

Returns the top 10 authors ranked by number of books in the catalog.

**Response:** `{ success, authors: [{ id, name, bio, bookCount }] }`

Returns all publishers sorted alphabetically by name.

**Response:** `{ success, publishers: [{ id, name, details }] }`

Returns the top 10 publishers ranked by number of books in the catalog.

**Response:** `{ success, publishers: [{ id, name, details, bookCount }] }`

header.description: For guests. Use Bearer token for auth users instead.

request.description:
Fetches the active cart. Works for both guests (x-session-id header) and authenticated users (Bearer token).

**Response:** `{ success, cart: { id, cartItems: [{ id, quantity, book }] } }`

header.description: For guests. Remove if using Bearer auth.

request.description:
Adds a book to cart or increments quantity if already present (upsert).

**Response:** `{ success, cartItem: { id, quantity, bookId } }`

Updates the quantity of a specific cart item.

**Response:** `{ success, cartItem: { id, quantity } }`

Removes a single item from the cart.

**Response:** `{ success, message }`

Atomic ACID checkout — locks stock, applies coupon/points, and places the order in a single transaction. `paymentMethod` options: `COD | BKASH | NAGAD | CARD`.

**Response:** `{ success, order: { id, orderNumber, grandTotal, orderStatus } }`

Returns the user's full purchase history.

**Response:** `{ success, orders: [{ id, orderNumber, grandTotal, orderStatus, createdAt }] }`

Returns a single order's full details including line items and a text invoice.

**Response:** `{ success, order: { ...allFields, orderItems, address }, invoice: '...' }`

item.name: Get Approved Reviews for a Book

request.description:
Returns all approved reviews for a specific book, best rated first.

**Response:** `{ success, reviews: [{ id, rating, reviewText, user: { name } }] }`

Submits a book review. User must have a DELIVERED order containing this book. Review is pending admin approval.

**Response:** `{ success, message, review: { id, rating, reviewText, isApproved } }`

Returns all publicly approved site testimonials, newest first. Use on homepage.

**Response:** `{ success, reviews: [{ id, rating, reviewText, createdAt, user: { name } }] }`

Any authenticated user can submit one site review. Pending admin approval. `rating` is 1–5 (required). `reviewText` min 10 chars.

**Response:** `{ success, message, review: { id, rating, reviewText, isApproved } }`

Returns optimised DB aggregate stats.

**Response:** `{ todaysSales, monthlySales, totalRevenue, abandonedCarts, activeOrders, uniqueVisitors, conversionRate }`

Admin version of best sellers with full book data.

**Response:** `{ success, books: [{ id, title, price, imageUrls, totalSold }] }`

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Advanced Prisma Guide",
    "categoryId": "<uuid>",
    "authorId": "<uuid>",
    "publisherId": "<uuid>",
    "isbn": "978-3-16-148410-0",
    "price": 500,
    "stock": 100,
    "discountPercent": 10,
    "description": "An in-depth guide to Prisma ORM.",
    "pages": 320,
    "language": "English",
    "imageUrls": ["https://i.ibb.co/example/book-cover.jpg"]
}

request.description:
Adds a new book to inventory.

**Response:** `{ success, book: { id, title, price, stock, createdAt } }`

Updates any fields on an existing book (partial update supported).

**Response:** `{ success, book: { ...updatedFields } }`

Creates a new book category.

**Response:** `{ success, category: { id, name, slug } }`

Updates an existing category.

**Response:** `{ success, category: { id, name, slug } }`

Deletes a category (will fail if books are linked).

**Response:** `{ success, message }`

Creates a new author.

**Response:** `{ success, author: { id, name, bio } }`

Updates an existing author's details.

**Response:** `{ success, author: { id, name, bio } }`

Deletes an author (will fail if books are linked).

**Response:** `{ success, message }`

Creates a new publisher.

**Response:** `{ success, publisher: { id, name, details } }`

Updates publisher info.

**Response:** `{ success, publisher: { id, name, details } }`

Deletes a publisher (will fail if books are linked).

**Response:** `{ success, message }`

Creates a combo bundle with multiple books.

**Response:** `{ success, combo: { id, title, price, comboItems } }`

Deletes a combo offer.

**Response:** `{ success, message }`

`type` options: `PERCENTAGE | FIXED | FREE_DELIVERY`.

**Response:** `{ success, coupon: { id, code, type, value, validUntil } }`

Lists all created coupons.

**Response:** `{ success, coupons: [...] }`

Deletes a coupon by ID.

**Response:** `{ success, message }`

Paginated list of all orders across all users.

**Response:** `{ success, orders: [...], meta: { total, page } }`

`status` options: `NEW | CONFIRMED | PACKED | SHIPPED | DELIVERED | CANCELLED | RETURNED`.

**Response:** `{ success, order: { id, orderStatus, trackingLink } }`

Approves or rejects a pending book review. Set `isApproved: false` to reject.

**Response:** `{ success, review: { id, isApproved } }`

Returns all unapproved site testimonials awaiting moderation.

**Response:** `{ success, reviews: [{ id, rating, reviewText, createdAt, user: { name, email } }] }`

Approves or rejects a pending site review.

**Response:** `{ success, review: { id, isApproved } }`

variable.description: Auto-set by Login and Verify Registration test scripts
